UserComments.Comment: Charging station is programmed to prevent using Mennekes to Schuko adapters,i could not use Mennekes to Schuko adapter,charging station shuts down power after few mins,when i use Mennekes to Schuko adapter,thus i had to use standard Mennekes to Yazaki cable,thus i could charge my Citroën C0,but i could not use my 230V heater,for which i need Mennekes to Schuko adapter & splitter,as my vehicle has its own heating inaccessible during charging,the result is,i waited for my vehicle to recharge in terrible cold!If U have an old vehicle with heating unavailable during charging,U will have to endure without life support,as this charging station is designed to prevent U to use adapters & splitters & thus 230V heater too.Also,who have a smaller vehicle with Schuko-only inlet,U will be unable to charge here,for example,if U have an e-bike,e-scooter,wheelchair,small or old EV with wall-socket charging option only,U will be unable to charge here,as the charging station will shut down every few mins,when U plug in via Mennekes to Schuko adapter.

UsageCost: Extra fees,when time limit is exceeded!!!

Connections.Comments: L-N voltage mentioned(L-L voltage is 400V). KWh:8CZK for PRE registered users;10CZK for non-registered users;13.5CZK for E.On users. Time limit 3hrs.of continuous charging,if exceeded,U will pay extra fees,to avoid those restart charging every 3hrs..
